response_text:
:::writing
To: All Warehouse Staff  
From: Operations Management  
Subject: Temporary Shift Schedule Change for Holiday Season  
Date: November 10

As we approach the upcoming holiday season, order volumes are expected to increase significantly. To keep operations running smoothly and ensure timely deliveries for our customers, we will be implementing a temporary shift schedule change beginning Monday, November 27 and continuing through Friday, December 29.

During this period, the warehouse will operate on two extended shifts:

Morning Shift: 6:00 AM – 2:30 PM  
Evening Shift: 3:00 PM – 11:30 PM

Some employees may be reassigned to different shifts than their usual schedule. Updated shift assignments will be posted on the scheduling board and sent via email by November 17. Please review your assigned shift carefully.

We understand schedule changes can be an adjustment, and we appreciate your flexibility during this busy time. If you have conflicts or questions regarding your assignment, please speak with your supervisor or contact HR as soon as possible so we can work with you.

Thank you for your continued hard work and dedication during our busiest season.

Operations Management
:::
